JUDGE DONNA HITCHENS, CLERK NICOLE ADAMS, REPORTER CARLITO MANDIA. MASTER SHORT CAUSE CALENDAR OF JUN-16-2003 ASSIGNED TO SHORT CAUSE TRIAL CALENDAR ON JUN-16-2003 AT 9:35 AM IN DEPT. 218, SUE M KAPLAN.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHINESE TIMES CORPORATION A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRENDWAY PRESS CORPORATION A CORPORATION $39,002.09 PRINCIPAL, $7,672.50 ATTORNEY FEES, $998.20 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $47,672.79, SEE SCANNED DOC.
